353.reason: [Error: Should append tempChar instead of source.charAt(curPos), causing the first character of the token to be lost]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: Should append tempChar instead of source.charAt(curPos), causing the first character of the token to be lost]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: Should append tempChar, not source.charAt(curPos). This causes the first character of the token to be lost, leading to incorrect token value.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  [error: should be stringBuilder.append(tempChar); because tempChar holds the '|' character read; appending source.charAt(curPos) will skip the current character and potentially cause incorrect token]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  IndexOutOfBoundsException: accesses source.charAt(curPos) without first checking if curPos is within bounds; should check and conditionally append.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The code incorrectly appends the next character (source.charAt(curPos)) instead of the current character ('|'). It should append tempChar first, similar to how '&' is handled. This causes the token to start with the wrong character or throw an exception if curPos is out of bounds.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  Logic Error: The code attempts to append the character at `curPos` to the string builder before checking if `curPos` is within bounds or if the character is actually '|'. This causes an IndexOutOfBoundsException if '|' is the last character on the line, or incorrectly consumes/appends the next character if it is not '|'. It should first check `curPos < source.length()` and `source.charAt(curPos) == '|'`.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [should append tempChar ('|') instead of source.charAt(curPos), which is the next character; this causes incorrect token construction and potential IndexOutOfBoundsException]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [should append tempChar ('|') instead of source.charAt(curPos), which may be out of bounds or incorrect character]
